title: 10x genomics cell ranger outputs for Berkovich et al. manuscript
author: Berkovich, Regina
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
10x genomics cell ranger outputs (single-cell RNA sequencing of cerebrospinal fluid cells) for Berkovich et al. manuscript about natalizumab treatment gap. 
 A is before gap, B is after gap. For details please see the manuscript.
